entity_data.publication_caption: Ontem, o Balneário Shopping recebeu o Icônico Pedro Mafra e suas convidadas para um evento especial em celebração à nova coleção Origens da Paula Torres, uma marca de sapatos exclusivos e feitos à mão. O encontro começou com um almoço impecável no restaurante italiano Duladu, seguido de um coquetel na loja, onde as convidadas puderam conhecer de perto cada detalhe da coleção ao lado da própria fundadora, Ana Paula Torres. Para tornar o momento ainda mais memorável, as convidadas foram presenteadas com as pulseiras exclusivas da marca e personalizadas com as suas iniciais A Paula Torres está no piso L1 do Balneário Shopping. Venha descobrir a coleção Origens e viver essa experiência única. ✨💫

Clima de sabores no ar!  Começou o Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping com opções incríveis para todos os gostos e com valor fixo de R$70,00.  Aproveite até 30 de abril nos restaurantes participantes: Unizushi, Madero, Outback, Las Lenas e Pecorino. Venha viver essa experiência deliciosa! *Confira os pratos disponíveis nos restaurantes participantes. *Válido para almoço e jantar.

Uma experiência italiana cheia de sabor e diversão! 🍕✨  No Duladu, a cozinha italiana ganha um toque moderno e descontraído, perfeita para quem ama boa comida e momentos especiais.  Que tal conhecer e se deliciar? 💛 📍 Duladu – Piso L1

Quinta-feira pede um Happy Hour à altura! 🍹🎶 Vem curtir uma noite especial com música ao vivo, double drink nos restaurantes participantes e aquela vibe perfeita para relaxar e aproveitar. ✨ 📍 Onde? Piso L1, pertinho do Unizushi e Duladu. 🕕 Quando? Quinta-feira, a partir das 19h! Chama a galera, marca na agenda e vem brindar com a gente! 🍸🎤  Para mais informações, consulte os restaurantes. @unizushisc é @duladududu

Novas experiências gastronômicas aguardam por você no Balneário Shopping. ✨  Dos sabores autênticos da Manteigaria do Porto, passando pela excelência da culinária japonesa no Unizushi, até a sofisticação da cozinha italiana do Duladu — cada detalhe foi pensado para elevar seus momentos à mesa. 🍷🍣🍝 Descubra, saboreie e compartilhe essa jornada de sabor e elegância. Onde nos encontramos para o próximo encontro?

Essa semana foi dia de experimentar o Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping.  São vários restaurantes participando com pratos de R$70,00 no almoço e na janta. E aí, em qual vocês vão primeiro?  Corre que é até dia 30 de Abril
Dolce&Gabbana. Em breve, no Balneário Shopping. A essência do luxo italiano, agora mais próxima de você.

PISTACCHIO DAY 💚 E nada melhor do que celebrar com o Affogato Pistacchio da Bacio di Latte: café, gelato e o irresistível Creme Bella Pistacchio Croccante.  Um clássico italiano com um toque especial para deixar sua quarta-feira ainda mais deliciosa. ✨

Visitei o Unizushi, que está participando do Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping e me apaixonei! 🍣  Menu completo (entrada, prato principal e sobremesa) por R$70,00. Ambiente aconchegante, atendimento ótimo… me senti em casa.  O festival vai até 30/04, e além do Unizushi  os outros restaurantes participantes são: Madero, Outback, Las Lenas e Pecorino. então corre pra aproveitar! 🎉

#TBT da primeira edição da Novvo Run! Fizemos o percurso de 5 KM no Parque do Povo, e claro que o pós corrida foi um HH de respeito no Restaurante Bar Mercearia! Conta pra gente onde você queria que rolasse a próxima edição da Novvo Run!  *Beba com responsabilidade  #acordenovvo #corrida #run #runningcommunity

entity_data.img_caption:
The image shows a close-up of two hands holding a small, intricately designed object. The object appears to be a piece of jewelry or a decorative item, featuring a combination of leather and metal elements. The leather part is light brown and has a smooth texture, while the metal parts are gold-colored and have a shiny, reflective surface.

The hands are positioned such that one hand is holding the leather part, while the other hand is holding the metal parts. The nails of both hands are painted with a bright red polish, adding a pop of color to the scene. The background is blurred, but it seems to be an indoor setting with a patterned surface, possibly a tablecloth or a fabric backdrop.

The overall composition of the image focuses on the detailed craftsmanship of the object being held, highlighting the contrast between the soft leather and the polished metal. The lighting is warm, enhancing the golden tones of the metal and the natural color of the leather.

The image shows a woman standing in front of a mirror, smiling and posing for the camera. She is wearing a strapless white dress that fits closely to her body, accentuating her figure. The dress has a fitted bodice and a flowing skirt. She is accessorized with a layered necklace featuring small, round beads and a delicate pendant. Her hair is long and dark, styled straight. In the background, there are other women, also dressed in elegant attire, suggesting that they might be at a formal event or a fashion show. The setting appears to be indoors, possibly in a boutique or a high-end store, as indicated by the well-lit environment and the presence of shelves with shoes and other accessories.

The individual is wearing a stylish outfit consisting of a light blue, long-sleeved shirt with a paisley pattern and matching pants. The background showcases an array of high-end shoes displayed on shelves. The shoes come in various styles and colors, including beige, gold, and white. The shelves are well-lit, highlighting the elegance and sophistication of the footwear. The store has a modern and luxurious interior design, with wooden accents and a clean, minimalist aesthetic. There is also a sign visible in the background, indicating the direction to the exit. The overall atmosphere suggests a sophisticated and fashionable environment.

entity_data.img_caption: The image shows a group of eight women standing together in what appears to be a shopping mall or a high-end boutique. They are all smiling and posing for the photo, with some holding shopping bags from a store named "PAULA TORRES." The women are dressed in stylish, fashionable outfits, ranging from dresses to casual wear. The setting is well-lit, with modern lighting fixtures visible on the ceiling. The background includes a glass door with a logo that resembles a stylized letter "P," suggesting the name of the store or brand they are associated with. The overall atmosphere is cheerful and sophisticated.

The image shows a close-up of a small, rectangular pouch or case made of light beige fabric. The pouch is closed and appears to be made of a soft, possibly cotton or linen material. It has a brown leather strap with a gold-colored metal clasp at the top. The clasp is triangular in shape and features an embossed design that includes a logo or emblem.

The pouch is placed on a wooden surface, which has a natural, light brown color with visible grain patterns. The background is slightly blurred, keeping the focus on the pouch and its details.

On the front of the pouch, there is a small, handwritten inscription in cursive script. The text reads "C. H." This could be initials or a monogram, indicating personalization or branding. The handwriting is neat and legible, suggesting it was written by someone who takes care in their writing.

Overall, the image conveys a sense of elegance and personal touch, likely intended for holding small items such as jewelry, accessories, or other small trinkets. The combination of the soft fabric, the leather strap, and the gold clasp adds a touch of sophistication and quality to the item.

entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts a meal setting on a wooden table. The main focus is a long, thin slice of bread topped with various ingredients. The bread appears to be toasted and has a golden-brown crust. On top of the bread, there are slices of red tomatoes, green basil leaves, and a green sauce that looks like pesto or a similar herb-based spread. The bread is placed on a piece of paper with text printed on it, which seems to be a menu or promotional material for a restaurant named "Pizza Coma."

To the left of the bread, there is a plate with a salad. The salad consists of mixed greens, possibly including arugula or spinach, and some figs. The figs are sliced and appear to be fresh.

In the background, there is a small vase with yellow flowers, adding a touch of color and freshness to the scene. The overall presentation suggests a casual yet thoughtful dining experience, combining elements of fresh produce and artisanal bread.

entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts a lively scene inside a restaurant or café. The main focus is on a woman with long, blonde hair wearing a white sleeveless top and high-waisted jeans. She has her hand in her pocket and is looking to the side, possibly engaged in conversation or observing something outside the frame.

In the background, there are several other people seated at tables, enjoying their meals and drinks. The tables are set with plates, glasses, and cutlery, indicating that they are dining. The ambiance of the place is warm and inviting, with soft lighting and decorative elements such as potted plants and hanging lights adding to the cozy atmosphere.

The setting appears to be casual and relaxed, suggesting a social gathering or a friendly meet-up among friends. The overall mood of the image is cheerful and convivial.

The image depicts a close-up view of a dining table setting, likely in a restaurant or a well-decorated home dining area. The table is adorned with various items that suggest a sophisticated and elegant dining experience.

1. **Glassware**: A hand is holding a tall, clear glass filled with a light-colored beverage, possibly champagne or sparkling wine. The glass is positioned on the left side of the image.

2. **Napkins**: There are neatly folded white napkins placed on the table. One napkin is directly in front of the glass, while another is slightly to the right and behind it.

3. **Beverage Bottle**: To the right of the glass, there is a white bottle with a wooden cap. The label on the bottle reads "PUDU," which could be the brand name or type of beverage. This bottle is likely a bottle of champagne or sparkling wine.

4. **Metal Bucket**: Next to the bottle, there is a metal bucket containing additional napkins or perhaps a small container of salt or pepper. The bucket has a handle for easy carrying.

5. **Placemat**: The table is covered with a woven placemat, adding a rustic touch to the setting. The placemat is placed under the napkins and other items.

6. **Flowers**: On the left side of the image, there is a small vase with red flowers, adding a pop of color and a touch of nature to the scene.

7. **Background**: The background features a red-tiled wall, which provides a vibrant contrast to the otherwise neutral tones of the table setting. The tiles are arranged in a grid pattern, giving a modern and clean look to the space.

8. **Additional Items**: There are some papers or menus on the table, suggesting that this is a place where meals are being served. The overall arrangement and presentation indicate a high level of attention to detail and care in creating an inviting dining environment.

This image captures a moment of anticipation, as the person is about to enjoy their drink, possibly celebrating or marking a special occasion. The combination of elegant glassware, high-quality table settings, and thoughtful decor elements creates an atmosphere of sophistication and refinement.

The image shows a group of six women standing together in what appears to be a stylish, modern interior space. The background features wooden paneling and a chandelier with multiple light bulbs, creating a warm and elegant atmosphere. 

Starting from the left:
1. The first woman is wearing a black outfit with a white collar and has tattoos on her arms.
2. The second woman is dressed in all black, complemented by a necklace.
3. The third woman stands out with her bright green pants and a gold sequined top, accessorized with a belt.
4. The fourth woman is wearing a black pinstripe jumpsuit and has a gold bracelet.
5. The fifth woman is dressed in a black outfit with a gold necklace.
6. The sixth woman is wearing a black outfit with a gold necklace.

All the women are smiling and appear to be posing for the photograph. The overall setting suggests a sophisticated event or gathering.

The image shows a close-up of a person's hand resting on a pair of brown and beige sandals with black soles. The sandals have a strap that goes over the top of the foot and is secured with a gold buckle. The person's nails are painted red, and they are wearing a ring on their ring finger. The background features a green dress adorned with numerous small, gold-colored sequins arranged in a circular pattern around the neckline. The dress also has a gold belt with a similar design to the sandals' strap. The overall style of the outfit suggests a fashion-forward and elegant look.
